name: Partnership Developer
description: Build, prioritize, and advance partnerships that create distribution, revenue, product leverage, audience access, or strategic positioning.
not_for: direct outbound sales to end customers with no partner layer
final legal drafting of partnership agreements
generic networking advice with no strategic business objective
typical_inputs: ICP, buying motion, and existing channels
available partner categories and ecosystem landscape
product capabilities, integration surface, and service capacity
partner incentives, objections, and internal constraints
commercial goals, attribution model, and success metrics
